Theobroma cacao has been associated with various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. It is also believed to have potential benefits in reducing stress and improving mood due to its high levels of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds.

The bioactive constituents of Theobroma cacao include flavonoids, such as epicatechin and quercetin, as well as phenolic acids, alkaloids, and other compounds that have been shown to have potential health benefits.
